themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents performing research tasks, making decisions, or collaborating autonomously.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focused on AI tools that help developers write, review, or debug code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles covering various AI-powered tools used for research purposes, from data analysis to content generation.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Discussions around AI-generated content or entities that mimic human users for testing or simulation.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Content related to AI's ability to condense large amounts of text or data into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Articles exploring how AI is affecting jobs, roles, and the nature of work.

themes.name: AI recruitment research
themes.description: Research and discussions on how AI influences hiring, job displacement, and the labor market.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Articles detailing the use of AI in testing the usability of products and systems.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Focuses on AI's application in analyzing and understanding user sentiment from feedback and reviews.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Content exploring the research, capabilities, and implications of AI chatbots.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
